diagram.taskQueuedTooltip: The task enters the execution queue. Only 1 task running per project at a time. Multiple paused tasks are allowed.
diagram.completedTooltip: Patterns detected during the cycle are saved in the Knowledge Base to feed future tasks.
steps.spec.0: Auto-analysis of repo if no description (language, frameworks, structure, tests)
steps.spec.1: The agent analyzes the spec (description + acceptance criteria)
steps.spec.2: Evaluates: clear functionality? defined criteria? sufficient context?
steps.spec.3: If OK → automatically proceeds to Phase 1
steps.spec.4: If incomplete → pauses with suggestions for user to refine
steps.spec.5: User edits the spec or accepts as is → continues
steps.plan.4: User approves → continues to Phase 2 | Re-plan → repeats Phase 1
steps.impl.0: Git: WIP commit if changes → checkout main → pull → create feature branch
steps.impl.2: Unit tests for each public method
steps.impl.4: Branch saved in DB for safe resume
steps.gate.1: IA Review: Security → Standards → Validation → Tests → Architecture
steps.gate.2: If Critical/High/Medium → FIX → back to step 1
steps.gate.3: Knowledge capture: reusable patterns saved in DB
steps.ship.0: Conventional commit + Push to feature branch
steps.ship.1: Create PR with detailed description on GitHub
steps.pr.0: The agent stops — waits for human review on GitHub
steps.pr.1: The reviewer leaves inline comments on the PR (variable time)
steps.pr.2: User clicks "Fetch & Fix" on the dashboard
steps.pr.3: Agent gets unresolved threads via GraphQL (with diffHunk and suggestions)
steps.pr.4: Processes each thread individually: analyze → fix or reject → resolve
steps.pr.5: Squash all fixes into 1 clean commit + push
steps.pr.6: Returns to wait — repeats until approved
tooltip.specConditional: Automatic or pauses if spec incomplete
tooltip.prManual: Manual — user decides when to continue
tooltip.patternsKnowledge: Detected patterns are saved in the Knowledge Base for future tasks.
tooltip.gitPrepareSteps.1: If changes: git add -A && WIP commit
tooltip.gitPrepareSteps.4: Branch saved in DB for safe resume
tooltip.gitPrepareNote1: 1 task running per project (max). Multiple paused allowed.
tooltip.gitPrepareNote2: Branch verified when resuming any task.
tooltip.completedNotes.0: IA Reviewer (Phase 3) → knowledge entry in SQLite
tooltip.completedNotes.1: PR Feedback (Phase 5) → knowledge entry if reusable
tooltip.completedNotes.2: Future project tasks receive knowledge injected in prompts
tooltip.fetchFixSteps.2: Per thread: analyze critically → fix or reject → resolve on GitHub
tooltip.fetchFixSteps.3: Atomic commit per thread + knowledge capture if reusable
tooltip.fetchFixSteps.4: Squash all commits into 1 clean + push --force-with-lease
tooltip.fetchFixSteps.5: Returns to wait — repeats until approved
hooks.label: Hooks:
